heading: Authorization of appropriations to provide United States Special Resources
label: 285n Authorization of appropriations to provide United States Special Resources
text: For the purpose of providing United States Special Resources to the Bank there is hereby authorized to be appropriated $100,000,000, all of which shall remain available until expended.
notes: Amendments1973— substituted “$100,000,000” for “$60,000,000 for the fiscal year 1972 and $40,000,000 for the fiscal year 1973”.Pub. L. 93–189
amendments: Amendments1973— substituted “$100,000,000” for “$60,000,000 for the fiscal year 1972 and $40,000,000 for the fiscal year 1973”.Pub. L. 93–189
